paper_candidates.title: Masked Clustering Prediction for Unsupervised Point Cloud Pre-training
paper_candidates.reason: Directly uses vision transformers for point cloud pre-training, aligning with the transformer method.
paper_candidates.abstract: Vision transformers (ViTs) have recently been widely applied to 3D point cloud understanding, with masked autoencoding as the predominant pre-training paradigm. However, the challenge of learning dense and informative semantic features from point clouds via standard ViTs remains underexplored. We propose MaskClu, a novel unsupervised pre-training method for ViTs on 3D point clouds that integrates masked point modeling with clustering-based learning. MaskClu is designed to reconstruct both cluster assignments and cluster centers from masked point clouds, thus encouraging the model to capture de

paper_candidates.title: Deep Learning for 3D Point Clouds: A Survey
paper_candidates.reason: Survey on deep learning for point clouds; covers transformers but not focused.
paper_candidates.abstract: Point cloud learning has lately attracted increasing attention due to its wide applications in many areas, such as computer vision, autonomous driving, and robotics. As a dominating technique in AI, deep learning has been successfully used to solve various 2D vision problems. However, deep learning on point clouds is still in its infancy due to the unique challenges faced by the processing of point clouds with deep neural networks. Recently, deep learning on point clouds has become even thriving, with numerous methods being proposed to address different problems in this area. To stimulate futu
